name: io.github.cpz-lab/cpzai
title: CPZAI
description: Build, backtest, and deploy quantitative trading strategies. List strategies, run backtests, place orders through Alpaca / Interactive Brokers / FIX, and manage portfolios — all from your AI agent. Paper-only by default; live trading requires explicit per-strategy promotion.

headers.name: X-CPZ-Key
headers.description: CPZ platform API key (create one at https://ai.cpz-lab.com/settings/api-keys).

headers.name: X-CPZ-Secret
headers.description: CPZ platform API secret (paired with X-CPZ-Key).
